items.title: Coordinate Echelon AI + Morgan Stanley meeting at Knowledge26
items.context: Email from Tunde at Morgan Stanley on Apr 24: 'I am going to be at Knowledge26 in 2 weeks so happy to connect briefly out there if you would be there as well?' — directed at Rahul and Eddie (Echelon AI co-founders).

items.title: Follow up with Lauren at Amex for Entro Security evaluation feedback
items.context: Email from Fan on Apr 16: 'I followed up with Lauren at Amex again today for her feedback. I haven't heard back yet, but I will keep you posted.' No confirmation of response received yet.

items.title: Get Entro Series B round terms (price, lead investor) for IC discussion
items.context: Email from Fan on Apr 16: 'have you already signed a term sheet? Could you share the latest dynamics - such as price and lead - so that I can include those details in our IC discussion?'

items.title: Leverage Fin network for Entro pipeline deals (Morgan Stanley, Edward Jones, PNC, Fidelity)
items.context: Email from Fan on Apr 16: 'I noticed several familiar names... including Morgan Stanley, Edward Jones, Cox Automotive, PNC, and Fidelity. I would like to bring this to our IC discussion and leverage our team's network.' Itzik asked to align on B round status before outreach.

items.title: Check with Martin from Array on Optery conflict and circle back to Lawrence
items.context: Email from Derek on Apr 22: 'We're also checking with Martin from Array on conflict and will circle back shortly.'

items.title: Review Opti sales materials and Gong demo recordings from Barak
items.context: Email from Barak Perelman (CEO, Opti) on Apr 23: shared sales deck, demo recording with WM's CISO, and AWS pitch/demo recording via Gong links.

items.title: Send Sentra intro to Amex AI investments team
items.context: Email from Fan on Apr 20: 'I just heard back from my friend who leads AI investments and partnerships at Amex, and she is very interested in learning more about the product. I will connect you with the Amex team shortly.' Ashwin replied: 'Love to get connected to the Amex Team.'

items.title: Make LP and strategic partner intros for Sentra
items.context: Email from Fan on Apr 20: 'I will share the solution with some LPs/strategic partners that you might want to meet and make intros wherever there's a mutual fit.' Ashwin replied: 'looking forward to the introductions to your LPs and strategic partners.'

items.title: Follow up on Logan's VanishID product trial and Elizabeth's session results
items.context: Email from Matt Polak on Apr 22: 'Logan -- just making sure you are all set with my team. I understand Elizabeth already had her session.'

items.title: Prep for Blaise intro meeting with Roy Confino on Apr 27
items.context: Calendar event 'Jake Fuchs / Shiv Wadhwani (Fin Capital) / Roy Confino (Blaise)' on Apr 27 at 9:00 AM ET — new company meeting with pluto.security founder.

items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Prism Layer <> Fin Capital' on Apr 27 at 10:00 AM ET with simone@prismlayer.ai — new deal screening call.
